subject: A winged serpentine creature curled in a ring, its skeletal skull-head facing outward, with a cluster of floating skull-faced spirits rising from within the ring
description: A large winged creature coils in an ouroboros-like ring formation on a dark stone or void surface. Its body is serpentine and scaled, pale blue-grey in color, with two bat-like wings visible at the upper portion of the ring. The creature's skull-like head is at the lower right, open-jawed and skeletal. Within the interior of the ring floats a cluster of small spirits — each is a glowing yellowish-green skull or skull-faced specter, varying in size, with some trailing wispy tendrils. The background is very dark teal-black with faint architectural shapes at the edges suggesting curtains or archways. The composition has the quality of a horror-occult diagram or a contained nightmare.
foreground: Winged serpentine creature coiled in a ring, skull-head open, cluster of small skull-spirits floating inside the ring
background: Dark void with faint architectural curtain-like shapes at edges
emotion: dread and inevitability — the circling form conveys repetition without end, the spirits appear trapped or multiplying
